mtp_aux_heads_train_only.title: Train-only multi-token heads
mtp_aux_heads_train_only.summary: Add 2 auxiliary future-token heads on top of the shared trunk during training, then drop them before export so bytes stay nearly unchanged.
mtp_aux_heads_train_only.why_it_fits: Parameter Golf is wallclock-limited, so sample-efficiency improvements that disappear at export are unusually attractive.
mtp_aux_heads_train_only.implementation_sketch: Reuse the final hidden states. Add two lightweight projection heads for t+2 and t+3 targets, weight their losses below the main next-token loss, and strip the extra heads before serialization and eval.

staged_qat_large_matrices.title: Staged fake-quant final phase
staged_qat_large_matrices.summary: During the last 10-15% of training, periodically fake-quantize only the large 2D block matrices while keeping small control tensors in higher precision.
staged_qat_large_matrices.why_it_fits: The current baseline loses meaningful score at roundtrip export, so export-aware training is one of the cleanest ways to improve the true objective.
staged_qat_large_matrices.implementation_sketch: Start with the existing int8 per-row export path as a differentiable or straight-through approximation. Apply it every N steps late in training, then optionally explore 4-bit groupwise variants once the int8-aware version is stable.

shared_depth_recurrence_3x_unroll.title: 3-block shared-depth recurrence
shared_depth_recurrence_3x_unroll.summary: Replace many untied layers with 2-3 shared blocks unrolled multiple times, using step embeddings and per-step gates or norms.
shared_depth_recurrence_3x_unroll.why_it_fits: The challenge is byte-constrained but not compute-starved, so reusing parameters across depth is a direct way to buy more effective depth per byte.
shared_depth_recurrence_3x_unroll.implementation_sketch: Start from the current trunk, keep attention/MLP shapes fixed, tie block weights across repeated steps, inject a learned step embedding, and add minimal per-step scaling to avoid optimization collapse.

factorized_embeddings_sp4096.title: Factorized tied embeddings with larger vocab
factorized_embeddings_sp4096.summary: Factor the token embedding/output map so the model can afford a 2k-4k tokenizer without paying a full vocab x model_dim byte tax.
factorized_embeddings_sp4096.why_it_fits: The current baseline keeps vocab small because embeddings are expensive. Factorization can reallocate bytes from embeddings into a better tokenizer or a slightly stronger trunk.
factorized_embeddings_sp4096.implementation_sketch: Introduce vocab->embed_dim and embed_dim->model_dim factors with tied decoding through the transpose path. Sweep embed_dim aggressively downward and pair it with a higher-vocab sentencepiece variant.

aqlm_style_codebook_mlp.title: AQLM-style codebook MLP compression
aqlm_style_codebook_mlp.summary: Treat the largest MLP matrices as additive-codebook or prototype-compressed weights so artifact bytes fall faster than with naive int8 per-row quantization.
aqlm_style_codebook_mlp.why_it_fits: Most of the baseline parameter mass sits in large matrices, especially MLPs. Extreme-compression methods target exactly that regime.
aqlm_style_codebook_mlp.implementation_sketch: Start with MLP matrices only. Replace full tensors with codebook indices plus a small shared codebook, optionally with a low-rank residual. First try post-training codebooks, then move to jointly learned codebooks if the export path stays stable.
